terms.seoTitle: Terms of Service — Life Science Atlas
terms.seoDesc: Terms for Life Science Atlas learning products and service-assisted Quality Lab Blueprint engagements.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body:
## 1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using Life Science Atlas (the "Service"), you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

## 2. Description of the Service

Life Science Atlas provides learning content, decision-support tools, downloadable resources, and service-assisted Quality Lab Diagnostic and Blueprint engagements. Blueprint outputs are planning aids with stated assumptions and scope boundaries; they are not validated designs, regulatory approvals, engineering specifications, or supplier quotations.

## 3. User Accounts

You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for activity under your account. You may not share or resell account access.

## 4. Payments & Engagements

Stripe processes card transactions; Atlas does not store card details. Prices are in USD. Digital products are delivered after successful payment. Diagnostic and Blueprint services are governed by the scope, deliverables, timing, exclusions, reviewer role, revision allowance, payment schedule, and acceptance basis shown before work begins.

## 5. Intellectual Property

Atlas retains its platform, templates, methods, content, generic rules, and pre-existing intellectual property. Customers retain ownership of their submitted project information. Rights to project-specific deliverables and reuse are defined in the applicable engagement proposal. You may not copy, distribute, or resell Atlas content without written permission.

## 6. Professional Reliance and Liability

Atlas content and concept outputs support education and planning. Accountable site, quality, engineering, safety, supplier, and regulatory professionals must verify project-specific decisions. To the maximum extent allowed by law, Atlas is not liable for indirect or consequential losses arising from unsupported reliance outside the agreed scope.

## 7. Changes to the Terms

We may update these Terms. Changes take effect when posted; continued use after an update means you accept the revised Terms.

## 8. Contact

Questions: support@lifescienceatlas.com

privacy.seoDesc: How Life Science Atlas collects, uses, protects, retains and deletes account and Blueprint engagement information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
## 1. Information We Collect

We may collect account details, commercial-request contact and qualification context, service usage, technical/security logs, purchase records, and information you deliberately submit. Stripe handles card details; Atlas does not store them. Concept Blueprint models remain in your browser by default. A full Blueprint snapshot is stored only when an authenticated user explicitly chooses to attach it for review.

## 2. How We Use Information

We use information to provide and secure the Service, qualify and deliver requested engagements, process purchases, send transactional messages, support customers, and improve product quality.

## 3. Sharing and Access

We do not sell personal data. Data is shared only with service providers needed for hosting, database, email and payment operations, with confirmed Atlas reviewers or administrators who need it for an agreed engagement, or when legally required.

## 4. Data Security

We use HTTPS, password hashing, session controls and restricted operational access. No system is completely secure; do not submit confidential formulations, credentials, personal data about others, or proprietary methods through commercial intake.

## 5. Cookies

We use session cookies to keep you signed in and do not use third-party advertising cookies.

## 6. Your Choices and Rights

You may request access, correction, export or deletion, and unsubscribe from marketing. Authenticated users can delete attached Blueprint snapshots and their revisions from Projects. Contact support@lifescienceatlas.com for account or commercial-intake requests.

## 7. Retention

Browser-local concept models remain under your browser storage controls. Attached Blueprint snapshots remain until you delete them or an agreed engagement closeout requires removal. Account and commercial records are retained only as needed for service, security, legal and financial obligations; eligible deletion requests are completed within 30 days.

## 8. Contact

Questions: support@lifescienceatlas.com
